title: Analytics - Find My Device Opened
scenario: Firebase analytics logs default elements when user opens Find My Device screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected mobile device.
Tap on the device name to access Device Settings.
Locate and tap on the 'Find My Device' option from the Device Settings menu.
expected: The 'Find My Device' screen displays correctly with all expected elements: a graph showing signal strength or location data, events from the last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, and app metadata (app version, app build, app environment). A Firebase analytics event is logged upon opening the screen.
